data.body: df7b review round1 BLOCK: EINTR branch is dead code (PEP 475 auto-retries at C level) + caller-impact claim undercounted LockTimeout handlers (12 exist, all contention). Remediated: dropped EINTR branch+AC+test entirely; corrected caller analysis (12 handlers, all contention=unchanged, only genuine faults now surface). Re-reviewing.
